query:
SELECT 
  pv.id,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantName,
  pvp.sellingPriceFOB,
  pvp.sellingPriceRMB
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN product_variant_pricing pvp ON pv.id = pvp.variantId AND pvp.priceLevel = 'L1'
WHERE pv.productId = 60020
ORDER BY pv.isDefault DESC, pv.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
